name: Sommi The Worker [[Pokemon]]
description:
I'm obsessed with this specific NPC bahaha. I had to find one of his clones around Lumiose to get him in my trainer card lol. I'm normal about him and definitely don't search for more pictures of him daily.

One: chilling in the courtyard
Two: chilling at home (you're cooking together)
Three: you're an intern (you're working late together)
